/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -fvisibility=hidden -Wsign-compare -Wall -Wno-uninitialized -Wignored-qualifiers -Wcast-qual -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto -shared  -o ofdm_testbed_python.cpython-312-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/ofdm_testbed_python.dir/ber_python.cc.o CMakeFiles/ofdm_testbed_python.dir/python_bindings.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/thuctap2/gr-ofdm_testbed/build/lib:/usr/local/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_date_time.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_regex.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_unit_test_framework.so.1.83.0 ../../../lib/libgnuradio-ofdm_testbed.so.1.0.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libgnuradio-runtime.so.3.10.12.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_thread.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.so.1.83.0 /usr/local/lib/libgnuradio-pmt.so.3.10.12.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libvolk.so.3.1.2 -ldl -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libspdlog.so.1.12.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.9.1.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgmpxx.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgmp.so -lrt
